What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short dark hair wearing a black patterned shirt stands in a kitchen holding a stemmed glass of red liquid in his left hand. He gestures with his right hand near his chest while standing beside white cabinets and a wall-mounted spice rack. A white cutting board with a knife rests on the dark counter to his right before he places the glass down.
